description_long: This house is a single-story residential building surrounded by a variety of mature trees and landscaping, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The structure features a dark, gable-style roof with a prominent central ridge and a mix of light and dark exterior wall finishes. The front of the house is accessed by a long, straight walkway leading to a covered entryway, which is slightly recessed and flanked by greenery. Large windows are visible on the sides, providing ample natural light and views of the surrounding garden. The property includes a driveway and what appears to be a garage or carport on one side, integrated into the overall design. The landscaping is lush and well-maintained, with trees forming a natural barrier around the house.
description: A modern, single-story house with a dark gable roof, surrounded by mature trees and lush landscaping, featuring a prominent walkway and integrated garage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the house's roof, central walkway, and dense tree coverage around the property.
description_view_1: Side elevation highlighting the length of the house, the gable roof, and the line of trees forming a natural screen.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate top-down view displaying the back of the house, more trees, and the continuation of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side elevation showing the garage/carport area, the gable roof, and the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on sides
attribute_entryway_design: Straight walkway leading to a recessed, covered entry with minimalistic design and surrounded by landscaping
